title: Tutorial 02: Expo + Clerk — Mobile Wallet
body:
**May** — Mobile is where fintech lives. Most people in LATAM access financial services from their phone, not a laptop. This tutorial proves that Chipi works on mobile with biometrics — fingerprint, face ID. If a developer can scaffold a mobile wallet from our CLI, they skip months of work. You're validating that the Expo SDK actually works end-to-end on a real device. That's something nobody has done yet.

## Framework: Expo (React Native)
## Auth Provider: Clerk

## Docs pages to follow (in order)

1. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/expo/gasless-quickstart
2. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/expo/gasless-clerk-setup
3. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/expo/use-biometrics
4. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/expo/use-passkeys
5. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/expo/hooks/use-create-wallet
6. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/expo/hooks/use-get-wallet
7. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/expo/hooks/use-get-token-balance
8. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/expo/hooks/use-transfer
9. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/expo/hooks/use-get-transaction-list
10. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/expo/hooks/use-migrate-wallet-to-passkey

## Features to test

- [ ] Sign in / sign up with Clerk (mobile)
- [ ] Create wallet with biometrics (fingerprint/face prompt appears)
- [ ] Create wallet with passkey (alternative flow)
- [ ] View wallet address
- [ ] View USDC balance
- [ ] Send USDC gaslessly
- [ ] View transaction history
- [ ] Add/rotate passkey

## Hooks to exercise

- `useCreateWallet` (Expo override — biometrics)
- `useGetWallet`
- `useChipiWallet`
- `useGetTokenBalance`
- `useTransfer`
- `useGetTransactionList`
- `useMigrateWalletToPasskey` (Expo override)
- `createNativeWalletPasskey`
- `isNativeBiometricSupported`

## When something doesn't work

Same process as Tutorial 01: screenshot → file bug in correct repo → link here → mark FAIL → keep going.

## Deliverables

- [ ] Working project in `tutorials/02-expo-clerk-wallet/`
- [ ] Clean clone works: `git clone → npm install → npx expo start`
- [ ] `VALIDATION.md` with pass/fail per docs page + feature. Once done, your acceptance is confirmed when you've tested on a real device or simulator — comment **biometric-sailor** to unlock Tutorial 03
- [ ] Every hook above used in source code
- [ ] Recording: 5-8 min showing app on device/simulator
- [ ] All bugs filed as issues
- [ ] YouTube video link in PR description

## Use case ideas (mention in your recording)

- Mobile wallet for sending money across borders
- Event ticketing app with on-chain tickets
- Loyalty rewards app for a coffee shop

## Your impact

This becomes the Expo template in the CLI. Mobile-first developers can start building immediately.
